title: A Coruña, Galicia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to A Coruña, Galicia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

A Coruña is a city in Galicia with a population of 245,000. A historic Galician port city with a Roman lighthouse, glass-windowed galleries, and excellent seafood.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
